rows.label: qev026002_MSG0001
rows.name:
Welcome-! Welcome to the Ma-non
spaceship, reputed to have the
best performance in the universe! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026002_MSG0002
rows.name:
How was it? That transport device was amazing,
wasn't it? This is the super technology of the
Ma-non! Leave warp and ether stuff all to us, yo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026002_MSG0003
rows.name:
Now, getting right to the consultation
I mentioned earlier, yo. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026002_MSG0004
rows.name:
After the friendly relations between the Ma-non and Earthlings
were established, while we were moving our spaceship to NLA,
we made all sorts of things to line up in our shop, yo. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026002_MSG0005
rows.name:
We researched Earthling needs, so our
product lineup is fully stocked, yo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026002_MSG0006
rows.name:
However... the barrier coming from
cultural differences is thick, yo. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026002_MSG0007
rows.name:
Even though technically primitive things
should suffice, we're having an extremely
hard time developing daily necessities, yo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026002_MSG0008
rows.name:
Washing things with diluted chemicals,
or smearing paint on bare skin to
change facial features... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026002_MSG0009
rows.name:
Earthlings only want
strange things, yo ne! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026002_MSG0010
rows.name:
It's completely
incomprehensible, yo ne! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026002_MSG0011
rows.name:
So we eased up on daily necessities
and made a lot of weapons, since their
usage is relatively universal, yo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026002_MSG0012
rows.name:
Super powerful! Super
convenient! Super high-class! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026002_MSG0013
rows.name:
Ma-non weapons have all three beats covered, yo!
I'm sure Earthlings will be surprised by their
performance and buy a lot of them, but... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026002_MSG0014
rows.name:
I'm still worried about the cultural barrier, yo
ne... Will they really understand how good Ma-non
weapons are? I'm truly anxious about it, yo ne... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026002_MSG0015
rows.name:
And so! This is finally the main topic
of my consultation with you, yo. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026002_MSG0016
rows.name:
I want you to actually use the weapons we
made and show off their magnificence to
advertise them to the Earthlings, yo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026002_MSG0017
rows.name:
For now, I've prepared a
freshly made new product, yo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026002_MSG0018
rows.name:
First, I want you to go defeat enemies
called Quick Struts with this, no yo ne! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026002_MSG0019
rows.name:
It's preferable if you fight as flashily and noticeably
as possible, yo. That way, the advertising effect will be
outstanding! Buyers will appear one after another, yo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026002_MSG0020
rows.name:
I'm counting on you, yo! The future of
the Candid & Credible House of Fine
Wares rests on your shoulders, yo-! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026002_MSG0021
rows.name:
First, I want you to go defeat enemies
called Quick Struts with this, no yo ne! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026002_MSG0022
rows.name:
It's preferable if you fight as flashily and noticeably
as possible, yo. That way, the advertising effect will be
outstanding! Buyers will appear one after another, yo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026002_MSG0023
rows.name:
I'm counting on you, yo! The future of
the Candid & Credible House of Fine
Wares rests on your shoulders, yo-! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026002_MSG0024
rows.name:
Hey, welcome back! How was the
promotional activity? I bet the
product's power was astonishing, yo ne! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026002_MSG0025
rows.name:
Customers who want to see the product
are already here, too! For now, please
give back the weapon I handed you, yo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026002_MSG0026
rows.name:
While you were doing the promotional activity
this time, we went and developed another new
product, yo. Here! Please take this! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026002_MSG0027
rows.name:
This time it's a masterpiece with even
more power, yo! I definitely want you to
advertise it widely to the world, yo ne! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026002_MSG0028
rows.name:
But, just defeating enemies randomly
feels like it lacks impact, yo ne... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026002_MSG0029
rows.name: Hmm... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026002_MSG0030
rows.name:
Defeating a super strong enemy, or defeating a ton
of enemies... Which do you think is cooler? Which do
you think would make for better advertising, yo? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026002_JNK0010
rows.name: Strong Enemy Subjugation[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026002_SEL0011
rows.name:
Say that defeating a
strong enemy is cooler.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026002_JNK0020
rows.name: Multiple Subjugations[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026002_SEL0021
rows.name:
Say that defeating many enemies
is better advertising.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026002_MSG0031
rows.name:
That's right, yo ne! Impact is important, yo ne! If you
strike down a mighty enemy everyone knows, the weapon's
popularity will rise right along with your reputation, yo ne! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026002_MSG0032
rows.name:
So, I want you to target an enemy that's
as major-league as possible, no ne. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026002_MSG0033
rows.name: For example... right, a Welkin Aquila! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026002_MSG0034
rows.name:
There have been reports of them appearing nearby in the Primordial
Wilderness, and they match the enemy stats we envisioned for this
term's weapons perfectly, so it's exactly the right fit! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026002_MSG0035
rows.name:
If the mission succeeds and we get outstanding
promotional effects, I think it would be fine to
name the product the Welkin Aquila Buster, yo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026002_MSG0036
rows.name:
Well then, exterminate a Welkin Aquila using
the Candid & Credible House of Fine Wares'
new product! I'm counting on you, yo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026002_MSG0037
rows.name:
Oho... So you'll stylishly wipe out enemies
one after another, yo ne? It'll be a highly
difficult job, but are you okay with that? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026002_MSG0038
rows.name:
But because of that, we can expect
a great promotional effect, yo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026002_MSG0039
rows.name:
Then... how about defeating 99 Iron
Femina Suids, yo ne? It feels special,
and it gets me excited, yo ne! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026002_MSG0040
rows.name:
...No, wait, yo? Thinking about it carefully,
counting and verifying 99 of them would
be way too much of a hassle, yo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026002_MSG0041
rows.name:
Hmm... Let's just throw in a
discount and make it 10, yo ne! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026002_MSG0042
rows.name:
For the ad copy, I'll just write "Destroyed
over 10 of them in the blink of an eye...",
so there's no problem, yo ne! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026002_MSG0043
rows.name:
Well then, subjugate 10 Iron Femina Suids
using the Candid & Credible House of Fine
Wares' new product! I'm counting on you, yo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026002_MSG0044
rows.name:
We're heading to the head office now
to have a business meeting about
mass-producing the previous product, yo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026002_MSG0045
rows.name:
Our head office is located inside the Arms
Company in the BLADE Area, sa! I want you
to come report to us around there, no ne! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026002_MSG0046
rows.name:
Hey, welcome back! How was the
promotional activity? I bet the
product's power was astonishing, yo ne! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026002_MSG0047
rows.name:
Customers who want to see the product
are already here, too! For now, please
give back the weapon I handed you, yo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026002_MSG0048
rows.name:
[ST:wide ]—Ah, I can't receive it if you've still
got it fully equipped, sa. It'd be a big
help if you unequipped it first, yo ne! [ST:wait ]
